STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT MCGOVERN, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGOVERN, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1272 MARKET STREET #308, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,125.00 RENT, $89.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,214.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-18-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFENDANTR MAY HAVE A 2-WEEK STAY UPON APPLICATION ON MAY 18, 1999, AND PAYMENT OF $250.00 AND A SECOND 2-WEEK STAY UPON APPLICATION ON JUNE 1, 1999 AND PAYMENT OF $250.00. NO STAY PAST JUNE 15, 1999. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO MOVE TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
